articles.title: In the face of devastating loss, Jesmyn Ward holds onto 'respair' - NPR
articles.description: Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.
